# Skeleton

Styled skeleton component built on the zw-skeleton primitive.

<div class="zw-badge-row">
  <span class="zw-badge">@zeus-web/skeleton</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">primitive-only</span>
  <span class="zw-badge">Generated</span>
</div>

## Install

This component does not have a registry template yet.

Install the primitive package instead:

```bash
pnpm add @zeus-web/skeleton
```

## Imports

Styled registry component:

Not available yet.

Primitive React wrapper:

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@zeus-web/skeleton/react'
```

Web Component entry:

```ts
import '@zeus-web/skeleton/wc'
```

## Props

| Prop       | Type                                                    | Default | Description                |
| ---------- | ------------------------------------------------------- | ------- | -------------------------- |
| `variant`  | `SkeletonVariant`<br />Values: `text`, `rect`, `circle` | `rect`  | Shape variant.             |
| `animated` | `boolean`                                               | `true`  | Enables loading animation. |

## Events

No public events documented.

## Slots

No slots documented.

## Styling

Uses Tailwind: yes

Theme tokens:

- `bg-muted`

Internal selectors:

- `[data-slot=skeleton-root]`

## Registry

Registry source: not available yet.

The `skeleton` primitive is available through `@zeus-web/skeleton`, but it is not currently installable through `zweb add skeleton`.

Use the primitive package directly until a registry template is added.

## AI usage rules

Do:

- Use Skeleton for loading placeholders.

Do not:

- Do not show Skeleton for content that loads instantly.

## Examples

### React styled usage

```tsx
import { Skeleton } from '@/components/ui/skeleton'

export function Example() {
  return <Skeleton className="h-4 w-12" />
}
```
